title: Distant Kingdoms
short_description: A fantasy city builder blending settlement management, social systems, exploration, and adventure as humans, dwarves, elves, and orcs forge a new life in the land of Ineron.
description: A unique blend of City Building, Social Management, Exploration and Adventure gameplay, Distant Kingdoms brings a rich fantasy world to life. Help the Humans, Dwarves, Elves and Orcs of Talam, begin anew in the fabled land of Ineron.
